query: query getCalendarEvents($startDate: String, $endDate: String, $query: String, $regionType: String, $regionId: Int, $disciplineId: Int, $rankingCategoryId: Int, $permitLevelId: Int, $competitionGroupId: Int, $competitionSubgroupId: Int, $limit: Int, $offset: Int, $showOptionFilter: Int, $hideCompetitions: Boolean, $orderDirection: OrderDirection) { getCalendarEvents(startDate: $startDate, endDate: $endDate, query: $query, regionType: $regionType, regionId: $regionId, disciplineId: $disciplineId, rankingCategoryId: $rankingCategoryId, permitLevelId: $permitLevelId, competitionGroupId: $competitionGroupId, competitionSubgroupId: $competitionSubgroupId, limit: $limit, offset: $offset, showOptionFilter: $showOptionFilter, hideCompetitions: $hideCompetitions, orderDirection: $orderDirection) { results { id name dateRange venue area rankingCategory disciplines competitionGroup competitionSubgroup hasResults } parameters { totalCount } } }
